messages.config.validation.phone.nl: Phone number must use Dutch international format (+31 AA BBBBBBB, +31 AAA BBBBBB or +31 6 CBBBBBBB), or another country code in international +CC ... format, unless it is an 0800 or 0900 service number
messages.config.validation.url.generic: URL must include http:// or https:// and use a valid hostname, optionally with a port, path, query or fragment
